waitForRunLater() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.JavaFXTestBase

When button is clicked text changes.
withAccumDep(BigDecimal) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.InventoryItem
Sets the accumulated depreciation for this item and recalculates its net book value.
withContext(ReportContext, Supplier<T>) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime.ReportContextHolder
Executes the supplied work with the given context bound to the thread.
writeJasperOutput(String, JasperPrint, String) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.AbstractReportGenerator
Export the provided JasperPrint to disk.
writeModifiedCopy(File, File, String, DefaultTableModel) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger.ExcelDataWriter
Writes data from a DefaultTableModel to a specified sheet in an Excel workbook, creating a modified copy of an input Excel file.
writeOfxFile(String, OFX) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxV2JaxbWriter
Writes an OFX object structure (rooted by OFX) to a specified file path using JAXB.
writeOfxFile(String, OfxV2Writer.SignonData, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData>, OfxV2Writer.BankAccountInfo, BigDecimal, String, List<OfxV2Writer.TransactionData>, OfxV2Writer.CreditCardInfo, BigDecimal, String, OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxV2Writer
Writes a complete OFX 2.0 file, potentially including sign-on, banking, credit card, and investment sections.
writeOfxFile_includesInvestmentPositionsAndTransactions() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxV2WriterTest
 
writeOutput(Object, String, JasperPrint, String) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.service.ReportGeneratorLoader
Delegates to the generator's writeJasperOutput(format, print, baseName) method to export the rendered report to disk.
writeReport(ReportContext) - Method in interface nonprofitbookkeeping.api.ReportWriterIntf
Writes a report based on the provided report context.

writeTransactions(List<Transaction>, File) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.Ofx20Writer
Writes the given list of transactions to an OFX 2.0 XML file.
